latex: What is the perimeter, in centimeters, of the figure below?
diagram_notes: An L-shaped (rectilinear) polygon formed by a rectangle with a rectangular notch cut from the upper right corner. The right side is labeled 4 cm (full height). There is a horizontal step at the top where the notch is - the horizontal part of the step is labeled 3 cm, and the vertical drop is labeled 2 cm. The top horizontal edge (to the left of the notch) is labeled 4 cm. Right angles are marked at all corners with small squares. The bottom edge and remaining left side are not labeled but can be inferred.
